name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents with parallel orchestration, plan-first workflows, dual-agent QA automation, Execute Manager for bounded context growth, focused skills, plugin hooks, persistent memory, and .supervisor/ state management. 11 agent roles with YAML frontmatter: Launch Pad (Supervisor readiness with codebase analysis and jobs folder), Supervisor v4 (parallel orchestrator with tool call budgets), Execute Manager (Phase 3 poll loop with worker/reviewer lifecycle), Context-Keeper (externalized state), Worker (isolated implementation with self-summary files), Product Owner (business requirements), Orchestrator (task planning), Code Reviewer (quality gates with memory), Red Team Reviewer (adversarial audits with memory), QA Strategist (risk-based test strategy and audit), and QA Executor (discovery, test generation, execution with debate loop). Features 36 reusable skills including qa-strategy (risk framework and debate protocol), supervisor-readiness (pre-flight checklist and brief template), /commit (conventional commits), Playwright E2E testing, plugin quality gate hooks (SubagentStop for worker and execute-manager, TaskCompleted), and persistent agent memory across sessions.
